title: McDonaldsCraft: Reheated
description: A remake of McDonaldsCraft, a mod i made some time ago.
body:
Welcome to **McDonaldsCraft: Reheated**, a mod adding mcdonalds to minecraft.
This is a remake of my old mod McDonaldsCraft.

Adds the mcdimension, to access it place mcburger blocks in a nether portal frame shape and light it with the ronald effigy.

To get started, craft the antihealth conconction with 1 egg, 3 sugar and 1 cake.

Adds McBurger, which gives happiness when eaten.

Adds Mega McBurger, which gives obesity when eaten.

Adds the McArmor set, stronger than diamond.

Adds the McSword, which is equivalent to a diamond sword.

Adds the synthetic consumable and a hardened version, which are crafting materials.
